$comment: Stdin/stdout contract for plan-harmonizer (plan enrichment) in refine-plan workflow

plan.$comment: Base fields from implementation-plan.json schema (version, project, tasks). Enrichment fields (enrichment_version, review_annotations, harmonization_log, readiness_score) are absent on first pass.

related_files.relevance: File to be created or modified

review_findings.$comment: Flattened findings from staff-architect, review-orchestrator, or Pasteur output. verdict mirrors executive_assessment.verdict. source_reviewer and domain are optional extensions from bioinformatics reviews.

issue_register.title: Brief issue title
issue_register.domain: (optional) review domain, e.g. bioinformatics — enables domain-specific classification

output_instructions.critical: Your ENTIRE output must be a single JSON object conforming to the stdout section of this schema. gogent-team-run captures your process stdout as your result file (stdout_plan-harmonizer.json). Do NOT use the Write() tool — Write() calls to .claude/sessions/ and .claude/tmp/ are blocked as sensitive paths and will fail silently, wasting your time budget. Output JSON to stdout only.
output_instructions.team_dir_note: context.plan_path and context.review_path are for READING only. Do not write to them.

enriched_plan.$comment: Full implementation-plan.json structure with enrichment fields populated: enrichment_version, review_annotations, harmonization_log, readiness_score. base fields (version, project, tasks) are carried through unchanged unless a correction modifies a task.

harmonization_log.change: Description of what was changed in the plan

readiness_score.floor_rule: if fix_coverage < 2, total is capped at min(computed_total, 49)

readiness_score.$comment: Mirror of enriched_plan.readiness_score surfaced at top level for convenient consumption by orchestrators.
readiness_score.floor_rule: if fix_coverage < 2, total is capped at min(computed_total, 49)

warnings: Human review recommended for 2 low-confidence mappings
